subject: Art and Design
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: 1.7 DRAWING AND PAINTING FROM IMAGINATION
topics: This topic will help learners unlock the power of their imagination, it will give them freedom to
explore their thoughts, emotions, experiences and express them in a visual language. Drawing
and painting from imagination is a creative process that allows learners to tap into their inner
world and bring forth unique and innovative ideas.
activities:  out-door (at the market, school premises, outside the classroom…)
 technological (graphics, Computer Aided, Artificial intelligence- AI…)
